text.title: best-practices-2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for best-practices-2026 as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Accepting AI-generated code in bulk without review because "it looks right".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI tools produce plausible-looking code that may silently introduce security issues, wrong algorithms, or subtle type errors that only surface at runtime.
